---
title: "Little Maggie and Her Brother: A Sketch for Children"
---

## Little Maggie and Her Brother: A Sketch for Children

**Author:** Jane Margaret Hooper
**Date:** 1861
**Imprint:** London: Bell and Daldy

### Notes

Jane Hooper had a daughter Margaret L. Hooper (b. Middlesex 1854/5), who became an artist and illustrator and a son, Winnard Hooper (1853-1935), city editor of The Times. CMY\'s letter to Hooper perhaps implies that they were the characters in the story. CMY recommended it in ‘Hints on Reading\' <i>MP</i> (March 1862) 335, despite having told Ann Carter Smith she didn\'t care for it.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
